output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?opponent ?country ?countryLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q88716 .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventName .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventName) = 'en')
  FILTER(regex(STR(?eventName) , 'ITF Future' , 'i'))
  FILTER(regex(STR(?eventName) , 'Doubles' , 'i'))
  ?match wdt:P2283 ?event ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(MONTH(?date) AS ?month)
  FILTER(?month = 9)
  {
    ?match wdt:P152 wd:Q6793601 ; wdt:P153 ?opponent
  } UNION {
    ?match wdt:P153 wd:Q6793601 ; wdt:P152 ?opponent
  }
  ?opponent wdt:P27 ?country .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
}
